name: Riley's School Bus LLC
recent_news: In 2019 marked 80th year with new 2019 MCI J4500 coach (BUSRide). Three-generation family business now operated by Kevin Riley, who purchased the company in 1996; original founders started in 1939.
fit_notes: Small but very long-tenured (87 yrs) family operator with both school bus and motorcoach lines; owner Kevin Riley is third-generation — strong succession profile. Sub-scale (only ~6 school buses) for a meaningful tuck-in unless bundled with other rural MN operators.

name: Big 10 Bus
districts_or_customers: private/social charter customers in Columbus NE area
recent_news: Operated as an ancillary service of the Big 10 Sports Bar & Grill at 510 E 23rd St, Columbus NE; not a school bus or student transportation contractor.
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target. This is a 2-bus party/charter sideline of a sports bar, not a student transportation operator. School-bus tagging in source data appears to be a misclassification.

name: Downs School Bus LLC
districts_or_customers: likely Truth or Consequences Municipal Schools (Sierra County, NM)
recent_news: No public news, ownership, or M&A signals located. NM PED contractor PDF did not surface a clear match in extracts; company has no website or working phone in source record.
fit_notes: Plausible small family contractor to T-or-C Municipal Schools in rural southwest NM. Sub-scale and very limited public footprint — would require direct outreach via the school district to confirm operator status, ownership and fleet.

name: Joseph L Hamilton Sch Bus Svc
recent_news: No active website, current contracts, news or business filings located. Address (312 Walnut St #3100, Cincinnati) is a downtown high-rise registered-agent / mail-drop suite, not an operating bus yard. May be inactive, dissolved, or a registered legal entity only.
fit_notes: Likely NOT a viable tuck-in target. Address pattern (downtown office tower suite) plus zero operating footprint suggests either a shell, an inactive entity, or a misclassified record. De-prioritize without confirmation from Ohio SOS filings.

name: Lanes Bus Service
principals: Wendy Smith (Office Manager, per source data)
recent_news: Active intrastate MD school-bus contractor (USDOT 2057332); 39 power units, 48 drivers, ~558K annual miles in 2024; 1 non-injury crash in trailing 24 months. Incorporated 1975, 51 years in business.
fit_notes: Solid tuck-in candidate: ~39-bus independent serving Anne Arundel County Public Schools, 51-year operating history (likely founder-led / 2nd-gen). AACPS is a large suburban-DC district where Summit could consolidate among multiple small Harwood/Davidsonville contractors (Lanes, Jubb's, Chesapeake). Owner identification needed before approach.
